reviews.review_description:
Friendship is supposed to be built on trust, laughter, and maybe the occasional shared defeat in a video game. But when your friend Wacky turns into a virtual tyrant, things start to feel less like friendship and more like exile — repeated exile, in fact, from his game called Lethal Facility.

Wacky is a good friend most of the time. He’s funny, clever, and usually fun to play with. But once we log into Lethal Facility, a switch flips. Suddenly, he becomes power-hungry, unpredictable, and — let’s be honest — just plain annoying. He keeps kicking me from the game for no good reason. One minute we’re working together to survive or explore, and the next minute: BAM! I’m kicked out. No warning. No explanation. Just a cold, heartless “You have been removed from the server” message.

At first, I thought maybe it was a glitch. Maybe he hit the wrong button. But after the third, fourth, and tenth time, it was clear: this was personal. Maybe he thinks it’s funny. Maybe he just wants to feel like the boss. But let’s be real — getting kicked out over and over again is frustrating, especially when I’m just trying to have fun and be part of the team.

reviews.review_title: I played with the owner he's a great guy
reviews.review_description: So wacky has been working on this game since October and play the game to be an OG
